subcodes.first_line: O scion of Abraham, your verses were received and perused, but 'Abdu'l-Bahá's praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار حضرت ابراهیم منظومه شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید ولی ستایش عبدالبهاء
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
